display.purpose: Geist Pixel Circle; hero headlines at ≥60px only.

headline.purpose: Geist Sans 600; page and section headings.

label.purpose: Geist Mono uppercase + 0.14em tracking; metadata, table headers, eyebrows.

shadows.name: surface-1
shadows.purpose: Flush hairline ring; default card shadow level.

shadows.name: badge-default
shadows.purpose: Faint drop under the default Signal Blue badge.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-emphasis action; Signal Blue fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(0.6 0.2 250); color: oklch(1 0 0); font: 500 0.875rem/1 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.215,0.61,0.355,1), scale 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.56 0.2 250); } .ds-btn-primary:active { scale: 0.98; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action on a raised surface with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0 0 0 / 0.1); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.18 0.004 270); font: 500 0.875rem/1 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s ease-out, scale 0.1s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:active { scale: 0.98; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Lowest-emphasis action; muted text, fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.5 0.004 270); font: 500 0.875rem/1 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s ease-out, color 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06); color: oklch(0.18 0.004 270); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Badge
components.description: Signal Blue status chip with a faint drop shadow.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(0.6 0.2 250); color: oklch(1 0 0); font: 500 0.75rem/1 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 oklch(0.22 0 0 / 0.12); }

components.name: Info Badge
components.description: Tinted semantic status chip (info variant shown).
components.css: .ds-badge-info { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.1 250); border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(0.97 0.04 250); color: oklch(0.45 0.2 250); font: 500 0.75rem/1 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Hairline-bordered field with a Signal Blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 240px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0 0 0 / 0.1); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.18 0.004 270); font: 400 0.875rem/1 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5 0.004 270); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.2 250 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Raised surface panel; rounded-2xl with layered surface shadow.
components.html:
React Testing
12 skills matched for your stack.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; background: oklch(1 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 1px 1px -0.5px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 3px 3px -1.5px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card-title { font: 600 1.125rem/1.3 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); color: oklch(0.18 0.004 270); } .ds-card-desc { font: 400 0.875rem/1.6 var(--font-geist-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); color: oklch(0.5 0.004 270); }

narrative.overview: SkillBundle looks like a precision instrument for builders. The base is an almost-monochrome neutral field carrying a single blue signal color that means one thing: this is the action. Identity comes from contrast, exact alignment, and a few deliberate motifs (the Geist Pixel display face, the dot-matrix loading ripple) rather than from decoration. It borrows Firecrawl's restraint and Nothing OS's confidence. Neutrals are violet-tinted (hue 270, chroma 0.004), never flat gray, and depth is a real eight-step surface elevation system with equal light and dark themes.
keyCharacteristics: Near-monochrome neutral field, one blue accent used as a rare signal.
Violet-tinted neutrals (hue 270, chroma 0.004), never pure gray.
Eight-step tonal + shadow elevation system, equal light/dark themes.
Geist Pixel display face and dot-matrix loader as deliberate identity marks.
Fast, tactile interactions: 100ms transitions, a 0.98 active-press scale.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue appears on a small fraction of any screen: primary action, current selection, focus. Its rarity is the entire point. If two blue things compete on a screen, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The No-Gray-Gray Rule
rules.body: Neutrals are never chroma 0. Every neutral inherits hue 270 at chroma 0.004. Pure gray is forbidden; the violet trace keeps the interface from feeling dead.

rules.name: The Pixel Floor Rule
rules.body: Geist Pixel Circle collapses to ordinary mono below ~40px. Never set the display face below 60px; display is for hero scale only.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: Uppercase + wide tracking is reserved for short mono labels (≤4 words). Never set body copy in uppercase.

rules.name: The Material Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadow level and surface level are tuned together so a raised element looks lit, not pasted. Never hand-roll a box-shadow; use a surface-N level.

dos: Do keep Signal Blue (oklch(0.6 0.2 250)) rare: primary action, active state, focus, links. One signal per screen.
Do tint every neutral toward hue 270 at chroma 0.004; never use pure gray.
Do use surface-N levels for any raised element so light and dark depth stay coherent.
Do keep Ink Muted (oklch(0.5 ...)) for secondary text; verify ≥4.5:1 before lightening anything.
Do reserve the Geist Pixel display face for ≥60px hero moments.
Do use the DotMatrixRipple for loading states, not a generic spinner.
Do keep transitions fast (100ms ease-out) and let the 0.98 active scale carry the press.
donts: Don't use gradient hero blobs or any background-clip: text gradient text. The accent is a single solid color.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism; blur and glass are not the default surface.
Don't set the Geist Pixel face below ~40px; it collapses into broken mono.
Don't use uppercase for body copy; reserve it for short mono labels (≤4 words).
Don't hand-roll box-shadow; use the surface-N elevation system.
Don't introduce a second accent hue or let two blue elements compete on one screen.
Don't make it look template-generated, cartoonish, or like a generic SaaS landing page.
